//: Shared deploy-digest parity vectors. Each `digest` was produced by the Go server's internal/manifest.Digest over its `files`; the SDK's digest() must reproduce it byte-for-byte, and the Go parity test (internal/manifest/parity_test.go) pins the SAME values. The `non-ascii` vector deliberately mixes a supplementary-plane filename (emoji) with a high-BMP one so it catches a UTF-16-vs-UTF-8 sort divergence; regenerate BOTH sides together if the digest contract ever changes.
